# Payment Management API

**Layer:** Business | **Pattern:** Business Service
**BIAN:** Disbursement (semantic_alignment)
**Generated by:** GitHub Copilot – Claude Sonnet 4.6

## Purpose

Manages the payment lifecycle for approved supplier invoices: scheduling, order generation, execution delegation to the banking system, and status tracking.

## Key Business Rules Enforced

| Rule | Description |
|------|-------------|
| BR-006 | Only APPROVED invoices can be scheduled |
| BR-007 | scheduled_date is required and must be ≥ today |
| Idempotency | X-Idempotency-Key required for payment operations |

## Endpoints

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| POST | /payments | Schedule payment |
| GET | /payments | List payments |
| GET | /payments/{id} | Payment detail |
| POST | /payments/{id}/execute | Execute (internal) |
| POST | /payments/webhooks/banking | Banking confirmation |

## Dependencies

| API | Purpose |
|-----|---------|
| invoice-lifecycle-api | Transition invoice to SCHEDULED / PAID |
| banking-integration-api | Send payment order + receive confirmations |
| erp-integration-api | Post accounting entry after payment |

## Data Ownership

PostgreSQL: `payment_orders` table indexed by `invoice_id`, `status`, `scheduled_date`.
